T1.description: Random variable with chi-square distribution with 3 degrees of freedom, one of the four variables summed.

T2.description: Random variable with chi-square distribution with 7 degrees of freedom, one of the four variables summed.

T3.description: Random variable with chi-square distribution with 9 degrees of freedom, one of the four variables summed.

T4.description: Random variable with chi-square distribution with 10 degrees of freedom, one of the four variables summed.

threshold.description: The value 19.77 against which the sum of the T_i variables is compared in the probability calculation.
